title: CINEMATIC MALAY SOLEMNIZATION | Farah and Affiq
description:
Witness the stunning solemnization of Farah and Afiq at the prestigious Sime Darby Convention Centre, where tradition meets elegance. The wedding venue was transformed with a breathtaking Arabic-themed décor, beautifully designed by Flair Design, setting the perfect atmosphere for this joyous occasion.

The bride and groom dazzled in their second outfit, inspired by Turkish and Arabic fashion, adding a touch of cultural sophistication to their special day. Every detail, from the exquisite decor

Dr. Farah & Afiq’s Intimate Outdoor Wedding at Puncak Dani, Genting Highlands

Join us in celebrating the beautiful wedding of Dr. Farah and Afiq at the stunning Puncak Dani in Genting Highlands. Set against the serene backdrop of lush greenery, this intimate outdoor wedding begins with a heartfelt solemnization ceremony, where the couple exchanges vows surrounded by close family and friends.

As night falls, the celebration continues with a special Khatam Al-Quran ceremony, honoring the couple’
